message:
fix(core): update robot_api_contracts proptests for 34 API surfaces and Skipped outcome

- Update variant count from 33 to 34 after new API surface was added
- Account for CheckOutcome::Skipped in execution counters (passed + failed
  + skipped = total)
- Fix pass_rate assertion to match implementation: passed/(passed+failed)
  not passed/total. 31/31 tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
